## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and its motivation. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link all issues addressed by this PR. Use "Closes #N" to auto-close on merge. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `type: bug` — defect fix
- [ ] `type: feature` — new feature
- [ ] `type: refactor` — restructuring, no behaviour change
- [ ] `type: test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `type: docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `type: ci` — CI/CD configuration
- [ ] `type: chore` — build, deps, configuration
- [ ] `type: breaking` — breaking API change (requires minor/major bump)
- [ ] `type: decision` — design decision recorded

## Checklist

- [ ] `tox -e pre-push` passed locally — format, quality, tests, coverage
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (user-facing changes only)
- [ ] All related issues are referenced in commits (`Closes #N`)
- [ ] Any `type: decision` issue is linked and its closing checklist is complete
- [ ] No temporary fix — root cause addressed
